common.site_description: Measure how visible your site is to AI answer engines
auth.magic_link_form.errors.invalid_emai: Please enter a valid email address
auth.magic_link_form.errors.send_failed: Could not send the link. Please try again.
auth.signup.title: Create your account
auth.signup.subtitle: We'll email you a magic link — no password required.
auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a magic link.
auth.verify.title: Check your email
auth.verify.subtitle: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link in the email to continue.
auth.verify.did_not_receive: Didn't receive it? Check spam, or use a different email.
auth.onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
auth.onboarding.subtitle: Workspaces hold your sites and analyses.
auth.callback.failed_subtitle: The link may have expired. Try requesting a new one.
app.dashboard.title: Dashboard
app.dashboard.no_workspace: You don't have a workspace yet.
app.sites.title: Sites
app.sites.subtitle: Sites and competitors tracked in {workspace}.
app.sites.own_empty: Add your first site to start measuring AEO visibility.
app.sites.no_workspace_yet: Set up a workspace to start tracking sites.
app.sites.analyses_empty: No analyses yet. Run your first analysis to see results.
app.sites.site_not_found: We couldn't find this site in any of your workspaces.
app.sites.delete_confirm: Delete site {domain}? It will enter a 30-day cooldown before the domain can be re-added.
app.sites.delete_forbidden: Only workspace admins or owners can delete sites.
app.sites.form.type_own_desc: A site you own and want to improve.
app.sites.form.type_competitor_desc: A site you want to benchmark against.
app.sites.form.err_invalid_url: URL is invalid or missing a domain.
app.sites.form.err_trial_expired: Your trial has ended. Upgrade to continue editing.
app.sites.form.err_plan_limit: Your plan limit has been reached. Upgrade or remove a site.
app.sites.form.err_conflict: This domain is already registered or in a 30-day cooldown.
app.sites.form.err_url_change_limit: URL changes are limited to once per 30 days per workspace.
app.sites.analyze.title: Run analysis
app.sites.analyze.description: Choose which categories to analyze. Full scans cover all five.
app.sites.analyze.quota_none: Your plan has no analyses remaining this month.
app.sites.analyze.err_quota_or_trial: Out of analyses or trial expired. Upgrade to continue.
app.sites.analyze.err_forbidden: You don't have permission to trigger an analysis.
app.sites.analyze.err_concurrent: Another analysis is already running for this workspace.
app.sites.analyze.err_cooldown: This site was analyzed less than an hour ago. Try again later.
app.sites.results.result_not_found: We couldn't find this analysis result.
app.sites.results.running_subtitle: We're scoring your site. This page will update automatically.
app.sites.results.insights_unavailable: Insights are not available for this analysis.
app.sites.results.insights_high_priority: Some high-priority items were demoted to medium to keep the list focused.
app.sites.results.improvements_empty: No specific improvements were generated for this analysis.
app.charts.timeseries_empty: No completed analyses to chart yet.
app.charts.timeseries_single_point: Latest score: {score}/100 ({when}). Run another analysis to see the trend.
app.charts.timeseries_partial_legend: ✕ markers indicate partial analyses (some categories were skipped).
app.charts.radar_empty: No category scores available for this analysis.
app.pricing.title: Plans that grow with your visibility
app.pricing.subtitle: Start free for 7 days. Upgrade when you're ready to track competitors, expand sites, and unlock historical trends.
app.pricing.footnote: Prices in USD. Monthly plans cancel anytime. Annual plans save up to 15%.
app.pricing.plans.free.name: Free Trial
app.pricing.plans.free.tagline: Try every feature for 7 days. No card required.
app.pricing.plans.basic.name: Basic
app.pricing.plans.basic.tagline: For solo founders measuring a single site.
app.pricing.plans.pro.name: Pro
app.pricing.plans.pro.tagline: For marketing teams running comparisons across sites.
app.pricing.plans.business.name: Business
app.pricing.plans.business.tagline: For growing teams with industry benchmarks and SLA support.
app.pricing.enterprise.title: Custom plan for large organizations
app.pricing.enterprise.description: Annual contract with unlimited sites, competitors, custom analyses, and a dedicated customer success manager. Wire transfer accepted.
app.contact.title: Let's talk
app.contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need — demo, sales, support, or anything else. We typically reply within one business day.
app.contact.privacy_note: We use your message only to reply. Your data is never shared.
app.contact.fields.name: Name
app.contact.errors.name_too_long: Name must be 200 characters or fewer.
app.contact.errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
app.contact.errors.company_too_long: Company must be 200 characters or fewer.
app.contact.errors.message_too_long: Message must be 5000 characters or fewer.
app.contact.errors.rate_limit: You've sent several messages recently. Please try again in a minute.
app.contact.errors.validation: Please check the form for errors.
app.contact.errors.network: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
app.contact.errors.generic: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again.
app.contact.success.title: Thanks — we got your message.
app.contact.success.description: We'll review and reply to your email within one business day.
